PromptPayload.description: Prompt catalog request generated from profile and preferences.

RawJson.description: Raw JSON object retained as an explicit escape hatch for undocumented response drift.

info.description: Unofficial typed Hinge REST and Sendbird chat API surface generated from hinge-rs.
info.title: hinge-rs

post.description: Completes the email-device validation flow when OTP returns email 2FA.
Exchanges a phone number and OTP for Hinge and Sendbird tokens. A 412 response means email 2FA is required.
Starts the SMS OTP login flow for a phone number.

get.description: Fetches full detail for a connection subject.
Fetches match note for a subject.

delete.description: Deletes profile content by comma-separated content IDs.

post.description: Runs Hinge answer review before saving prompt content.

get.description: Fetches photos, prompts, and other profile content for the authenticated user.
Fetches public content records by comma-separated user IDs.

post.description: Runs Hinge text review and returns an HCM run ID used when sending notes/likes with comments.
Creates a distinct Sendbird group channel.

get.description: Fetches message history around an optional timestamp anchor.

post.description: Registers a generated install ID before SMS login.

get.description: Fetches one like by subject ID.
Fetches remaining standard and super likes.

post.description: Exchanges Hinge auth for a Sendbird JWT.
Sends a message through Hinge after ensuring a Sendbird DM channel exists.
Fetches prompt catalog using a payload derived from profile and preferences.
Creates a like, note, superlike, or skip rating.
Responds to an inbound like/match flow.
Fetches recommendation feeds for the authenticated user.
SDK helper that fetches channel/profile context and writes a local markdown export. This is not a remote Hinge endpoint.

get.description: Fetches a Sendbird group channel using the SDK endpoint.
Pseudo-operation documenting the Sendbird WebSocket handshake and typed events. The Rust client connects to wss://ws-{appId}.sendbird.com/.

patch.description: Applies profile updates using Hinge's numeric enum wire format.

get.description: Fetches public profile records by comma-separated user IDs.
Lists Sendbird group channels for the authenticated user using the mobile SDK query shape.
